allow: Bash(sqlite3 dofus.sqlite "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' AND name LIKE ''Quest%'';")
Bash(sqlite3 dofus.sqlite "SELECT q.id, CAST\(q.nameId AS TEXT\), q.levelMin, q.levelMax, q.isDungeonQuest FROM QuestData q LIMIT 10;")
Bash(sqlite3 dofus.sqlite "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' AND name IN \(''DungeonData'', ''SubAreaData'', ''AreaData'', ''SuperAreaData''\);")
Bash(sqlite3 dofus.sqlite "SELECT t.id, t.value, t.lang FROM translations WHERE t.id IN \(''752265'', ''220621'', ''220628'', ''232658'', ''802290''\) AND t.lang=''fr'';")
